text.name: sysdescription
text.text: Beats of Rage is a fan-made tribute game to Sega's Streets of Rage series. It supplants the original graphics and characters with resources taken from The King of Fighters series, albeit with tongue-in-cheek renames. Originally developed by Senile Team, the underlying engine powering Beats of Rage later went on to become the Open Beats of Rage (OpenBOR) game engine project.

text.name: sysdescription
text.text: Beats of Rage es un juego tributo a la serie Streets of Rage de Sega hecho por fans. Sustituye los gráficos y personajes originales por recursos tomados de la serie The King of Fighters, aunque con cambios de nombre irónicos. Originalmente desarrollado por Senile Team, el motor subyacente de Beats of Rage se convirtió más tarde en el proyecto Open Beats of Rage (OpenBOR).
